Meaning.Vi: Sự phục hồi, sự hồi phục
Meaning.En: The process of returning to a normal or healthy state after illness, injury, or hardship.
Meaning.Example: She made a full recovery after the surgery.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tình trạng bệnh nhân trở lại sức khỏe bình thường sau khi điều trị.
Situation.En: Describing a patient regaining normal health after medical treatment.

Situation.Vi: Tình trạng một nền kinh tế phục hồi sau suy thoái.
Situation.En: The state of an economy rebounding after a recession.

Meaning.Vi: Sự khôi phục, sự truy xuất lại (dữ liệu)
Meaning.En: The action or process of retrieving lost, corrupted, or deleted data from backup storage.
Meaning.Example: The IT team managed data recovery within two hours.

Situation.Vi: Khôi phục file bị xóa nhầm trên máy tính.
Situation.En: Restoring a file accidentally deleted from a computer.

Meaning.Vi: Sự thu hồi, sự hoàn lại (tiền, hàng)
Meaning.En: The act of retrieving something that was lost, stolen, or distributed in error.
Meaning.Example: The company initiated a product recovery after safety concerns were raised.

Situation.Vi: Thu hồi lô hàng thực phẩm bị nhiễm khuẩn.
Situation.En: Recalling a batch of food products contaminated with bacteria.
